name: telebridge
description: TeleBridge: Docker-first Telegram MTProto user message relay with Hugging Face Space support.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check scripts/userbot-config.mjs && node --check scripts/userbot-runtime.mjs && node --check scripts/login-user.mjs && node --check scripts/user-forwarder.mjs && node --test
